prompt_template:
Query: "{query}"
Document: {doc_text}

This query contains negation or constraints. Score how well this document satisfies the query INCLUDING any negation constraints (e.g., "not indicated" means the document should have contraindication data, not indication data).

Be selective with high scores. Score 0-10 where:
- 0-3: Irrelevant or contradicts the query requirements
- 4-6: Partially relevant but missing key negation/constraint requirements  
- 7-8: Good match with most negation/constraint requirements met
- 9-10: Exceptional match perfectly satisfying all query requirements

Output ONLY the number.
rationale: Enhanced prompt to encourage more discriminating scores. Failure cases show LLM giving similar high scores (7-9) to both gold docs and competitors, making ranking difficult. Added explicit scoring guidelines to encourage selectivity and better differentiation between good vs exceptional matches.
